${ModID}:KeepSummerSafe.NAME: Keep Summer Safe
${ModID}:KeepSummerSafe.DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! Block. NL If you have a debuff, draw 2 cards.

${ModID}:MortysMindBlowers.NAME: Morty's Mind Blowers
${ModID}:MortysMindBlowers.DESCRIPTION: Remove all debuffs. NL Draw !M! card, it costs 0 this turn. NL Gain !${ModID}:m2! ${ModID}:Portal_Sickness. NL Exhaust.

${ModID}:ShowMeWhatYouGot.NAME: SHOW ME WHAT YOU GOT
${ModID}:ShowMeWhatYouGot.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage to all enemies 4 times. NL Apply 3 Weak to all enemies. NL Gain 5 ${ModID}:Portal_Sickness.

${ModID}:BootlegPortalFluid.NAME: Bootleg Portal Fluid
${ModID}:BootlegPortalFluid.DESCRIPTION: At the start of your turn, gain 1 Strength for each distinct debuff you have. NL Gain 1 additional Strength for each debuff with more than 5 stacks.

${ModID}:ParmeezianDimension.NAME: Parmeezian Dimension
${ModID}:ParmeezianDimension.DESCRIPTION: Gain !B! Block. NL Transmute 1 card in your hand, reduce its cost to 0 this turn.

${ModID}:RoyALifeWellLived.NAME: Roy: A Life Well Lived
${ModID}:RoyALifeWellLived.DESCRIPTION: anniv5:transmute all cards in your hand into cards from a random pack in your pool.
${ModID}:RoyALifeWellLived.UPGRADE_DESCRIPTION: anniv5:transmute all cards in your hand into cards from a random pack in your pool. NL Retain.

${ModID}:PortalGun.NAME: Portal Gun
${ModID}:PortalGun.DESCRIPTION: Deal !D! damage. NL If you have ${ModID}:Portal_Sickness, gain a random 0 cost attack into your hand.

${ModID}:MortysAdventureCard.NAME: Morty's Adventure Card
${ModID}:MortysAdventureCard.DESCRIPTION: Gain !${ModID}:m2! ${ModID}:Portal_Sickness. NL Choose one: NL Gain !B! Block now. NL Gain !M! Block next turn.

${ModID}:WubbaLubbaDubDub.NAME: Wubba Lubba Dub Dub
${ModID}:WubbaLubbaDubDub.DESCRIPTION: Apply !M! Vulnerable and !M! Weak. NL Gain !${ModID}:m2! ${ModID}:Portal_Sickness. NL Exhaust.
